experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed complete full stack web application for multi-channel B2B AI order agent spanning database (PostgreSQL), backend APIs (Python), and frontend interfaces, delivering end-to-end features from conception to production across 7 enterprise clients processing 1,000+ orders

Engineered full stack internal tooling with React frontend and Python backend for operations teams: built Intercom ticketing interface (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order dashboard, and AWS S3 file management system handling 250+ attachments

Implemented full stack QA validation layer combining automated output checks and human-in-the-loop review to improve AI reliability; iterated on backend prompt logic and vector-store memory across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed Python backend abstraction layer over Grafanalib on 3-person engineering team, reducing code complexity by 83% (30+ lines to 5) for dashboard configuration
Migrated 7+ monitoring dashboards across 3 production Grafana environments with comprehensive unit test coverage at the application layer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern

Delivered complete review submission feature from user interface to database persistence; built Python GraphQL webscraper for backend course data ingestion across agile development sprints

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Built and deployed full stack web application at internshipmatcher.com covering complete technology stack: React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI Python backend, PostgreSQL database, Redis caching layer, and AWS S3 storage with Clerk JWT authentication

Architected dual-model AI pipeline (Claude Haiku 4.5 for skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for ranking top 30 to top 10) achieving 95%+ accuracy; implemented SSE streaming from backend to frontend for real-time progress updates in the user interface
Optimized full stack performance with parallel backend processing of 30+ positions, reducing end-to-end latency by 52% (270s to 130s) through dynamic batching and prompt caching

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Developed full stack automated sleep-stage scoring platform with React frontend dashboard and FastAPI Python backend, achieving 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy validated against clinical datasets
Built asynchronous backend pipeline using Redis + ARQ for distributed EEG data processing, spectral feature extraction, and Scikit-Learn classification with PostgreSQL persistence per patient
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming from backend to React frontend for real-time rendering of live EEG waveforms and hypnogram visualizations in the user interface

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Claude AI, Cal.com Integration)
bullets: Built and deployed production full stack autonomous SMS agent for Bay Area real estate client: FastAPI Python backend with FSM-driven pipeline, PostgreSQL database with Alembic migrations, and multi-service frontend integrations

Integrated complete web application stack: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid email service; dual-model Claude backend (Haiku + Sonnet) with async PostgreSQL and APScheduler job processing
Shipped live production application auto-booking qualified leads via Cal.com integration and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach for client
